description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on push to master and v2.0-preview branches, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. Use a windows-latest job with a matrix strategy to build and test with Python 3.9 in a Release configuration. The job should check out the code, configure and use a cache, set up Miniconda, configure a Conda environment, and then build, test, and install Reaktoro using clcache and Ninja.
